interpretation.why_needed: The wangjc out-of-bounds guard was configured with --blocked-gpus 4,5,6,7 and can send SIGTERM to BeyondMimic IsaacLab runs on the requested GPUs, matching the observed returncode -15.

target_policy: Only processes under /mnt/infini-data/test/wangjc whose command contains gpu_out_of_bounds_guard.py and --blocked-gpus including GPUs 4 and 7 are targeted.
